overall.description: Gameplay footage from a cinematic Western video game showing a character walking through a stormy night in a frontier town. The scene features muddy streets, wooden boardwalks, and timber-frame buildings illuminated by warm lantern light against dark stormy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden dock platform overlooking water

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden platform with railings overlooking dark water and distant lights

entered.detail: elevated wooden platform with weathered planks and railings overlooking water
wooden safety railings along the dock edge
dark water visible beyond the dock with distant lights on the horizon
faint warm lights visible across the water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated wooden dock platform at night, with the camera moving forward along weathered planks. Wooden railings line the edge overlooking dark water, with distant lights visible on the horizon across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway between warehouse structures

events.description: descends from elevated platform to ground level muddy area under wooden structures

agents.ego_description: walking down wooden stairs and ramps through industrial wooden support structures toward ground level

entered.detail: thick wooden beams and posts supporting the overhead structure
wet muddy earth with wooden planks scattered about
wooden staircase leading up to higher level

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the elevated dock into a ground-level area beneath wooden structures. The space is enclosed by thick wooden support posts and beams, with muddy ground underfoot and a wooden staircase visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy main street under building overhangs

events.description: emerges from under overhang into more open area with visible storm clouds

agents.ego_description: walking along muddy road passing under wooden building overhangs and street lanterns

entered.detail: raised wooden boardwalk running alongside the muddy road
two-story wooden building with lit windows and timber frame construction
hanging lantern casting warm yellow light onto the street

segments.scene_description: Moving along the muddy main street of the frontier town, passing under building overhangs. A raised wooden sidewalk runs along the left side, with timber buildings featuring warm lantern light. The sky becomes more visible showing dark storm clouds overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street approaching large two-story timber building

events.description: lightning flashes in the distance illuminating the storm clouds

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a large two-story timber building with illuminated windows and front porch

entered.detail: prominent two-story timber-frame building with multiple lit windows and decorative woodwork
stacked wooden barrels on the porch of the building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large, well-lit timber building with multiple windows glowing warm yellow against the night. Lightning flashes in the distant storm clouds as the camera moves past the building's front porch with stacked wooden barrels.

events.description: game UI prompt appears indicating option to wait until morning

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden boardwalk approaching a building with glass doors and windows

entered.detail: building with large glass pane doors and windows reflecting interior light
wooden shipping crate on the sidewalk
wooden picket fence running alongside the property

segments.scene_description: Walking along wooden boardwalks past frontier storefronts, approaching a building with distinctive glass doors. A game UI prompt appears offering to wait until morning. Wooden crates and fences line the path as the storm continues overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered back porch with outdoor cooking and seating area

agents.ego_description: moving around the building to explore a covered back porch area with outdoor furniture and cooking equipment

entered.detail: wooden picnic table with benches on the covered porch
metal grill and cooking implements on the porch
roofed wooden porch area with hanging lantern providing light

segments.scene_description: The character moves around to the back of the building, entering a covered porch area featuring a wooden picnic table, cooking grill, and benches. A hanging lantern provides warm light as lightning continues to flash in the stormy sky beyond the wooden fence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated waterfront dock into the muddy, lantern-lit heart of a stormy frontier town. It begins by gliding along weathered planks and railings overlooking dark water, before descending from the dock into a shadowed ground-level area enclosed by thick wooden support beams and mud. As the camera emerges onto the main street, the scene opens up to reveal timber buildings and raised sidewalks under a sky of churning storm clouds. The perspective then moves past a large, glowing timber building as lightning flashes in the distance, continuing along wooden boardwalks and storefronts toward a building with glass doors. Finally, the camera rounds the corner to the back of the structure, shifting into a covered porch area where a hanging lantern illuminates a picnic table and grill against the backdrop of the ongoing storm.
